original: Menes sighs dramatically, "I suppose - and this is because I'm feeling charitable - I would entertain the notion of a mere 900,000 credits." He looks at you sharply, "And that's only because you're a fellow demarch."

option_line: bffi_mpBuyerCredits800kJeffReact:"You're practically a saint. Now the matter of veracity..."
original: You're practically a saint. Now the matter of veracity...

Menes sighs dramatically, "I suppose - and this is because I'm feeling generous - I would entertain the notion of a mere 900,000 credits." He looks at you sharply, "And that's only because you've a League commission. It's practically charity!"

option_line: bffi_mpBuyerCredits800kJeffReact:"You're practically a saint. Now the matter of veracity..."
original: You're practically a saint. Now the matter of veracity...

Menes sighs dramatically. "What am I, a charity?"

"I suppose," he muses, "I suppose I'm in an oddly generous mood to even be discussing this."

option_line: bffi_mpBuyerCredits800kJeffReact:"You're practically a saint. Now the matter of veracity..."
original: You're practically a saint. Now the matter of veracity...
You think you hear a snort from Bornanew, but perhaps he just scuffed the floor.

option_line: bffi_mpBuyerWhoSold2:"Ulmus Pond sold you the glove, didn't he."
original: Ulmus Pond sold you the glove, didn't he.
"I'm afraid I could not reveal my source just now," Menes says haughtily. "They are very exclusive, and, and... sensitive."
